name: Checkpoints
description: Automatic checkpoint and rollback for agent workspaces.

enabled.label: Enable Checkpoints
enabled.help: Enable or disable automatic checkpoint creation.

storagePath.label: Storage Path
storagePath.help: Directory to store checkpoint metadata. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/checkpoints/.

triggerOn.label: Trigger Mode
triggerOn.help: When to create checkpoints: all_tools, mutating_tools (skip reads), or manual only.

maxCheckpointsPerSession.label: Max Checkpoints Per Session
maxCheckpointsPerSession.help: Maximum number of checkpoints per session before pruning old ones.

retentionDays.label: Retention Days
retentionDays.help: Number of days to keep checkpoint data.

restoreDefaultScope.label: Default Restore Scope
restoreDefaultScope.help: What to restore by default: files only, transcript only, or all.
